description: Fix gql() returning undefined cast as T when the GraphQL response has neither data nor errors, which causes a TypeError crash when tool handlers destructure the result.
qualityChecks: cd plugins/amplitude && npm run build && npm run type-check && npm run lint && npm run format:check

userStories.title: Guard against undefined data in gql() return value
userStories.description: In plugins/amplitude/src/amplitude-api.ts, the gql() function returns json.data as T at line 106 even when json.data is undefined (e.g., server returns {} with no errors and no data field). Tool handlers that destructure the result crash with TypeError. Add a guard before the return to throw ToolError.internal() when json.data is undefined.
acceptanceCriteria: gql() throws ToolError.internal when json.data is undefined and json.errors is also absent
gql() still returns json.data correctly when data is present
gql() still throws ToolError.internal/auth correctly when errors is present and data is absent
